name: spec
tagline: Turn vague intent into a precise, executable spec in five phases, optionally spawning an agent.
verdict: This skill is a comprehensive workflow for spec generation, with strong emphasis on clarity, verification, and structured decision-making. It includes robust quality gates, redaction scans, and detailed instructions for handling various scenarios, including plan mode and spawned sessions. The skill's voice and process are well-defined, promoting high-quality
